verses.text: With timbrel and harp and joyful acclaim, With dancing and song, give praise to his name! The Lord in his people his pleasure will take, With roves of salvation adorning the meek. The Psalter, 1912

In glory exult, O saints of the Lord; Let them on their beds his praises accord. May praises to God from each mouth now be poured, May they in their hands wield a double-edged sword. The Psalter, 1912

They’ll execute wrath on nations and lands, To bind kings with chains and nobles with bands, For so it is written, this judgment will fall. His saints have this glory. Give praise to the Lord. The Psalter, 1912
